description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-neon that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job running in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, prepare the environment, checkout the code, install dependencies, configure the build with custom CMake arguments, build, and install. Finally, dump job and steps context and send a notification to an IRC channel.
